variants.name: 咒法仪式
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，等同于施法上限数量的咒语将被抽取然后施放。[初始为玩家总数的1/3，向下取整]说书人可以将任何被抽中的咒语变为失去效果的哑咒。具有持续效果的咒语需要“施法专注”，如果另外一条此类的咒语被施放则前一个咒语的效果终止。每个黎明，被施放的咒语的名称会被公布。
variants.firstNightReminder: Cast Spells in the order they were drawn even if those players died tonight. Remove any "Ongoing Effect" tokens from dead players or those who cast a new spell. Place a "Cast" token on each player whose spell was successfully cast (or a "Dud" token if vetoed). Place an "Ongoing Effect" token on any player whose cast spell includes a lasting effect.
variants.otherNightReminder: Cast Spells in the order they were drawn even if those players died tonight. Remove any "Ongoing Effect" tokens from dead players or those who cast a new spell. Place a "Cast" token on each player whose spell was successfully cast (or a "Dud" token if vetoed). Place an "Ongoing Effect" token on any player whose cast spell includes a lasting effect.
